prompt: Create a photorealistic vertical portrait of a young woman of mixed Japanese and Middle Eastern heritage standing close to a plain light gray wall in soft natural window light. Frame her from the upper chest to slightly above the head, with her body turned slightly to the side and her head angled gently toward the camera. She has long, thick, glossy dark chocolate brown hair with subtle warm highlights, a natural center part, and loose flowing waves cascading over both shoulders. Her face is completely covered by one large opaque rectangular censor block centered over the face, extending from the forehead area down to the upper neck; the rectangle is a flat warm brown color matching skin tones, with sharp edges and no transparency. She wears a simple fitted soft beige scoop-neck top and a delicate small silver necklace. Use shallow depth of field, realistic skin and hair texture where visible, soft shadows on the wall, a bright triangular patch of sunlight on the right side of the background, muted neutral colors, intimate indoor fashion portrait styling, and high-resolution DSLR realism. No text, no watermark, no extra people, no visible facial features outside the censor block.
